s2.ptxt: Engage the 2 claws to install the unlock warning switch assembly to the steering lock sub-assembly.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL IGNITION SWITCH LOCK CYLINDER ASSEMBLY

s2.ptxt: Make sure that the ignition switch lock cylinder assembly is in the ACC position.
Install the ignition switch lock cylinder assembly to the steering lock sub-assembly.
Make sure that the ignition switch lock cylinder assembly is securely installed.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL STEERING COLUMN UPPER WITH SWITCH BRACKET ASSEMBLY

s2.ptxt: Temporarily install the steering column upper with switch bracket assembly and the steering lock bracket with 2 new tapered-head bolts.
Tighten the 2 tapered-head bolts until the bolt heads break off.
Align the transponder key amplifier with the installation position of the upper bracket with the amplifier inclined.
Push the transponder key amplifier up and install it to the upper bracket.

atten3.ptxt: Do not push the amplifier up with excessive force.

s2.ptxt: Install the steering column assembly with the bolt and 2 nuts.
Connect the connectors and wire harness clamps to the steering column assembly.
Align the matchmarks on the steering intermediate shaft assembly and the power steering link assembly.
Install the bolt.
Install the clamp to the steering column hole shield.
Engage the 2 claws to install the No. 1 air duct.

s-1.ptxt: PLACE FRONT WHEELS FACING STRAIGHT AHEAD
INSTALL TURN SIGNAL SWITCH ASSEMBLY WITH SPIRAL CABLE SUB-ASSEMBLY

s2.ptxt: Install the turn signal switch assembly with spiral cable sub-assembly to the steering column assembly with the clamp.
Connect the connectors to the turn signal switch assembly with spiral cable sub-assembly.
Engage the claw to install the upper steering column cover.
Engage the 2 claws to install the lower steering column cover.
Install the 2 screws.
Check that the ignition switch is off.
Check that the battery negative (-) cable is disconnected.

atten2.ptxt: Wait for 90 seconds after disconnecting the cable to prevent airbag deployment.

s2.ptxt: Rotate the spiral cable counterclockwise slowly by hand until it feels firm.

atten3.ptxt: Do not turn the spiral cable by the airbag wire harness.

s2.ptxt: Rotate the spiral cable clockwise approximately 2.5 turns to align the marks.

atten3.ptxt: Do not turn the spiral cable by the airbag wire harness.

atten4.ptxt: The spiral cable will rotate approximately 2.5 turns to both the left and right from the center.

s2.ptxt: Align the matchmarks on the steering wheel assembly and steering main shaft.
Install the steering wheel assembly set nut.
Connect the connectors to the spiral cable sub-assembly.
With the steering pad installed on the vehicle, perform a visual check. If there are any defects as mentioned below, replace the steering pad with a new one:

item.ptxt: Cuts, minute cracks or marked discoloration on the steering pad top surface or in the grooved portion.

s2.ptxt: Make sure that the horn sounds.

atten4.ptxt: If the horn does not sound, inspect the horn system (See page ).

s2.ptxt: Check that the ignition switch is off.
Check that the battery negative (-) terminal is disconnected.

atten2.ptxt: Wait for 90 seconds after disconnecting the cable to prevent airbag deployment.

s2.ptxt: Support the steering pad with one hand as shown in the illustration.
Connect the 2 airbag connectors to the steering pad.

atten3.ptxt: When handling the airbag connector, take care not to damage the airbag wire harness.

s2.ptxt: Connect the horn connector to the steering pad.
Confirm that the circumference groove of the "torx" screw fits in the screw case, and place the steering pad onto the steering wheel assembly.
Using a "torx" socket wrench (T30), tighten the 2 "torx" screws.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL LOWER NO. 2 STEERING WHEEL COVER
INSTALL LOWER NO. 3 STEERING WHEEL COVER
INSTALL DRIVER SIDE KNEE AIRBAG ASSEMBLY

s2.ptxt: Check that the ignition switch is off.
Check that the battery negative (-) cable is disconnected.

atten2.ptxt: Wait for 90 seconds after disconnecting the cable to prevent airbag deployment.

s2.ptxt: Temporarily install the driver side knee airbag assembly with the 2 hooks.
Engage the 2 claws and install the DLC 3 connector.
Install the driver side knee airbag assembly with the 4 bolts.
Connect the driver side knee airbag connector.

atten3.ptxt: When handling the airbag connector, take care not to damage the airbag wire harness.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL LOWER INSTRUMENT PANEL FINISH PANEL LH

s2.ptxt: Connect the connector.
Engage the 3 claws and 3 clips.
Install the 4 screws <B>.
Install the lower instrument panel sub-assembly with the bolt <A>.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL COWL SIDE TRIM SUB-ASSEMBLY LH

s2.ptxt: Engage the 2 clips.
Install the cowl side trim sub-assembly LH with the cowl side trim clip.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL FRONT DOOR SCUFF PLATE LH

s2.ptxt: Engage the 7 claws and 3 clips, then install the front door scuff plate LH.

s-1.ptxt: CONNECT CABLE TO NEGATIVE BATTERY TERMINAL
